diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -3,13 +3,12 @@
 import torch.nn.functional as F

 

 class TrafficPredictor(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, in_channels=12, hidden_channels=512, out_channels=12, dropout=0.1, num_gcn_layers=6):

+    def __init__(self, in_channels=12, hidden_channels=512, out_channels=12, dropout=0.05, num_gcn_layers=8):

         super().__init__()

-        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

-        self.tconv_in = nn.Conv1d(in_channels, hidden_channels, kernel_size=3, padding=1)

+        self.dropout = dropout

+        self.input_lin = nn.Linear(in_channels, hidden_channels)

         self.gcns = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(hidden_channels, hidden_channels) for _ in range(num_gcn_layers)])

-        self.tconv_out = nn.Conv1d(hidden_channels, out_channels, kernel_size=3, padding=1)

-        self.res_lin = nn.Linear(in_channels, hidden_channels)

+        self.output_lin = nn.Linear(hidden_channels, out_channels)

 

     def forward(self, x, adj_norm):

         if x.dim() == 2:

@@ -19,21 +18,15 @@
             adj_norm = adj_norm.unsqueeze(0).expand(B, -1, -1)

         if adj_norm.dtype != x.dtype:

             adj_norm = adj_norm.to(x.dtype)

-        orig_x = x

-        res = self.res_lin(orig_x)

-        x_t = orig_x.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, C, N]

-        x_t = F.relu(self.tconv_in(x_t))

-        x = x_t.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, N, hidden]

-        x = x + res

-        x = self.dropout(x)

-        x = torch.bmm(adj_norm, x)

+        x = self.input_lin(x)

+        x = F.relu(x)

+        x = F.dropout(x, p=self.dropout, training=self.training)

         for gcn in self.gcns:

-            res = x

-            x = F.relu(gcn(x))

-            x = self.dropout(x)

+            residual = x

+            x = gcn(x)

             x = torch.bmm(adj_norm, x)

-            x = x + res

-        x_t = x.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden, N]

-        x_t = self.tconv_out(x_t)

-        x = x_t.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, N, out_channels]

+            x = F.relu(x)

+            x = F.dropout(x, p=self.dropout, training=self.training)

+            x = x + residual

+        x = self.output_lin(x)

         return x

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -57,14 +57,14 @@
     std = np.std(train_np, axis=0).astype(np.float32)

     std = np.maximum(std, 1e-7)

     print(f"Mean shape: {mean.shape}, Std shape: {std.shape}")

-    model = TrafficPredictor(hidden_channels=512, num_gcn_layers=6, dropout=0.1)

+    model = TrafficPredictor(hidden_channels=512, num_gcn_layers=8, dropout=0.05)

     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

     model.to(device)

     adj_norm = adj_norm.to(device)

-    optimizer = AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=0.001, weight_decay=1e-4)

+    optimizer = AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=0.001, weight_decay=5e-5)

     scheduler = ReduceLROnPlateau(optimizer, mode='min', factor=0.5, patience=5, min_lr=1e-6)

     criterion = torch.nn.L1Loss()

-    num_epochs = 50

+    num_epochs = 40

     best_val_loss = float('inf')

     mean_t = torch.from_numpy(mean).to(device)

     std_t = torch.from_numpy(std).to(device)
